name: Builders FirstSource, Inc.
description: Builders FirstSource, Inc. is the largest U.S. supplier of building products, prefabricated components, and value-added services to the professional market segment for new residential construction and repair and remodeling. The company manufactures roof and floor trusses, wall panels, stairs, vinyl windows, custom millwork, and pre-hung doors. It also distributes dimensional lumber and lumber sheet goods, siding, decking, and various other building materials.
